prerequisites: An active Omnisend account with access to Store Settings.
An Omnisend API key generated under Store Settings -> API keys.
The api_key value, which is shown only once at creation and must be copied and stored immediately.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Omnisend authenticates requests with a single API key, which maps to the connector's required api_key secret field. The key is generated in the Omnisend dashboard and passed in an HTTP header (X-API-KEY for the v5 API, or Authorization: Omnisend-API-Key {key} together with an Omnisend-Version header on the newer versioned API). No OAuth client credentials are used for this connector.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key in Omnisend
setupSteps.body: In the Omnisend dashboard go to Store Settings -> API keys and click Create API key. Enter a name for the integration, then select the permissions/data types the key should access (Campaigns, Contacts, Orders, Products, Carts, Events). Click Create API key.

setupSteps.title: Copy and store the key
setupSteps.body: Copy the generated API key immediately. Omnisend does not display the key again after you close the screen; if it is lost you must generate a new one. Keys are case-sensitive.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the copied key as the connector's required api_key field. The connector uses this key to authenticate all requests to the Omnisend API at https://api.omnisend.com.
